channel.title: SwanSong for macOS Updates
channel.description: Developer ID signed and notarized SwanSong updates from GitHub Releases.

item.title: SwanSong 0.4.1
item.description:
Follow the source.

SwanSong 0.4.1 gives Translation Lab an ABI 9 path from a visible sprite to its private OAM ownership and cartridge lineage, plus a guarded handoff to static-analysis tools.

  • Trace sprites directly. Select sprite attributes independently from map, raster, and palette components.
  • Keep provenance private. OAM addresses, CPU writers, cartridge ranges, mapper context, and conservative origins stay inside the project.
  • Start analysis from a fact. Export a deterministic private Ghidra or pypcode seed from a current, complete source probe.
  • Handle real evidence safely. Source artifacts may grow to 64 MiB and 256 normalized ranges while uncertain lineage still fails closed.
  • Preserve prior work. The Evidence browser continues to read v1-v3 source artifacts after the move to ABI 9 schema v4.

Restart SwanSong and the MCP client after updating. Static-analysis seeds do not authorize patches, and private project evidence never leaves through SwanSong's tool responses. Read the full release notes.

item.title: SwanSong 0.4.0
item.description:
Build where you play.

SwanSong 0.4 adds Studio for the complete SwanSong SDK workflow and gives Translation Lab a deeper, private path from visible pixels to cartridge sources.

  • Make and iterate. Create a recipe, build assets, test, play, profile, inspect evidence, and package from one native workspace.
  • Turn play into proof. Record deterministic scenarios, compare visual and audio evidence, and require inspected results before release.
  • Trace upstream privately. Select map, raster, or palette provenance while exact cartridge and executed-read details stay inside the project.
  • Use the whole toolset. The installed plugin exposes persisted capture, both probes, record/verify, and the complete observed-play lifecycle.
  • Find the swan. SwanSong now has its own compact menu-bar status item.

Studio is a developer preview that uses SwanSong SDK 0.2 or newer and a separately installed toolchain. Your projects, ROMs, diagnostics, and evidence stay on your Mac. Read the full release notes.

item.title: SwanSong 0.3.1
item.description:
See exactly what changed.

SwanSong 0.3.1 turns Translation Lab into a workspace that remembers the whole investigation.

  • Keep every comparison. Original and Patched frames, replay plans, bindings, and pixel differences stay together inside your project.
  • Trace the pixels. Select a rectangle to learn which layer, map cells, tiles, palette, and final writer produced it.
  • Play at your pace. Observed sessions advance one visible step at a time while preserving clean from-boot proof.
  • Read without squinting. Support, Privacy, and Acknowledgements now use real headings, lists, links, and spacing.

Private by design. Detailed evidence stays in the project you choose. Read the full release notes.

item.title: SwanSong 0.3.0
item.description: This signed update is distributed through the official SwanSong GitHub release. Open the release page for complete notes and checksums.

item.title: SwanSong 0.2.0
item.description: This signed update is distributed through the official SwanSong GitHub release. Open the release page for complete notes and checksums.
